scripts.dev: concurrently -n shell,admin,events,booking,payment -c blue,magenta,cyan,green,yellow --kill-others-on-fail "cd frontend/shell && npm run dev" "cd frontend/mfe-admin && npm run start:dev" "cd frontend/mfe-events && npm run start:dev" "cd frontend/mfe-booking && npm run start:dev" "cd frontend/mfe-payment && npm run start:dev"
